name: 1️⃣ Trend Mining + Viral Idea Engine v2 (Google + Ollama Fallback)

nodes.name: Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)
nodes.notes: Triggered from influencer profile page via /api/influencers/[id]/n8n/trigger

nodes.name: 🔍 Exa: Trend Scraper
nodes.notes: Searches for trending viral content in the influencer's niche

nodes.name: 📈 Google Trends India
nodes.notes: Pulls trending data from Google Trends specifically for India (geo=IN)

parameters.prompt:
={{ '🎯 VIRAL IDEA ENGINE v2 — MATHEMATICAL PRECISION MODE

You are the world's most advanced AI viral content strategist trained on millions of viral posts.

━━━━ INFLUENCER DNA ━━━━
Name: ' + $('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.name + '
Niche: ' + $('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.niche + '
Full DNA: ' + JSON.stringify($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna, null, 0) + '

━━━━ TREND DATA ━━━━
Exa Trend Results: ' + JSON.stringify(($('🔍 Exa: Trend Scraper').item.json.results || []).slice(0, 5).map(r => ({ title: r.title, url: r.url, highlights: r.highlights })), null, 0) + '

━━━━ DNA CONSTRAINTS (MANDATORY) ━━━━
✅ Market: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.market_focus || 'India') + '
✅ Psychological Hooks: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.psychological_hooks || ['FOMO', 'Status']).join(', ') + '
✅ Pacing: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.pacing_bpm || 120) + ' BPM (STRICT)
✅ Reading Level: Grade ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.reading_grade_level || 5) + ' (STRICT)
✅ Retention Target: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.target_retention_curve || '3s hook → 12s build → loop') + '
✅ Primary Hook Style: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.primary_hook_archetype || 'The Contrarian') + '
✅ CPM Target: $' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.target_cpm || 10) + '/1000 views
✅ Platforms: ' + ($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy?.platform_priority || ['Instagram']).join(', ') + '

━━━━ MATHEMATICAL REQUIREMENTS ━━━━
• Hook MUST create dopamine spike in exactly 0-2 seconds
• Caption MUST use AIDA formula: Attention → Interest → Desire → Action
• Music BPM MUST match or be within 10% of pacing_bpm in DNA
• Image composition MUST follow 1:1.618 golden ratio framing
• Hashtag count: exactly 8-12. Mix 30% mega(>1M), 40% mid(100K-1M), 30% niche(<100K)
• Engagement strategy MUST include 1 call-to-action that creates comment bait

━━━━ OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON ARRAY ONLY) ━━━━
Return ONLY a valid JSON array of 5 objects. No markdown, no explanations.
Each object MUST have exactly these keys:
[
  {
    "viral_hook": "string — 8-12 words max, must trigger curiosity/FOMO/status",
    "image_prompt": "string — detailed Stable Diffusion/Flux prompt with character consistency & mathematical composition",
    "caption": "string — AIDA formula, Grade 5 reading level, 80-120 words",
    "hashtags": "string — 8-12 hashtags as space-separated string",
    "music_suggestion": "string — track style + BPM + mood",
    "engagement_strategy": "string — specific CTA and comment-bait technique",
    "video_hook_variations": ["string", "string", "string"],
    "platform": "instagram",
    "estimated_reach_score": number,
    "virality_score": number
  }
]' }}",

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ 'You are a viral content expert. Generate 5 Instagram content ideas for: ' + $('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.niche + ' targeting India. DNA: ' + JSON.stringify($('Webhook (Dashboard Trigger)').item.json.body.dna.viral_strategy) + '\n\nReturn ONLY a JSON array. Each item: {viral_hook, image_prompt, caption, hashtags, music_suggestion, engagement_strategy, video_hook_variations(array of 3), platform: "instagram", virality_score}' }}

nodes.name: 🦙 Ollama Fallback (Local LLM)
nodes.notes: Used when Gemini API is unavailable. Uses whatever local model is configured.

changes: Added Ollama local LLM fallback when Gemini fails
Added robust JSON parsing with markdown code block stripping
Added hashtags, platform, virality_score, estimated_reach_score to output
AIDA formula enforced in caption prompt
Golden ratio + mathematical composition added to image_prompt
Gemini API retry logic via fallback node
